scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const candidates = ['dist/exam-form', 'dist/exam-form/browser']; const outputDir = candidates.find((dir) => fs.existsSync(path.join(dir, 'index.html'))) || candidates.find((dir) => fs.existsSync(dir)); if (!outputDir) { console.warn('Warning: Angular output directory not found; skipping .htaccess copy'); process.exit(0); } if (fs.existsSync('src/assets/.htaccess')) { fs.copyFileSync('src/assets/.htaccess', path.join(outputDir, '.htaccess')); console.log('Copied .htaccess to ' + outputDir); } else { console.warn('Warning: src/assets/.htaccess not found'); }"
